metadata.description: Thresh Product OS — Agentic PM operating system for consulting engagements

plugins.name: thresh-pm
plugins.description: Full Thresh PM operating system: 15 skills covering customer data synthesis, interview pipeline, feedback triage, opportunity trees, feature prioritization, story writing, Jira integration, dependency tracking, sprint forecasting, risk scoring, and roadmap reconciliation. 14 commands, 7 agents, 9 playbooks, 8 schemas.
